description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a bold combination of yellow, black, white, and blue colors. The shoe's upper is primarily yellow with black mesh accents and a striking blue and white swirling pattern on the toe box, side panels, and tongue. White laces run through reinforced eyelets, and a prominent white swoosh-like design is present on the side. The midsole is thick and robust, with a mix of yellow, black, and white, providing both style and support. The back of the shoe displays the word 'ONE' in red on a yellow background, adding a unique branding element.
description: A vibrant high-top sneaker with yellow, black, white, and blue swirling patterns, white laces, and 'ONE' branding on the heel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow upper, blue and white swirling side panel, white swoosh, and black mesh accents.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the blue and white patterned toe box, white laces, and black tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar yellow and blue patterning, white swoosh, and visible midsole details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the 'ONE' branding in red on a yellow heel, with white and blue accents around the collar.
